title: nf-core-based quant pipeline (≥3 datasets)
context: The core third-party-runnable quantification pipeline (nf-core/rnaseq backbone) that scales the M0 reproduction to ≥3 open datasets (PLAN §8 M1). Reproducibility and license-respect are mandatory. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Build a Nextflow (nf-core/rnaseq-based) quantification pipeline that runs on ≥3 open Ewing datasets with pinned references, digest-pinned containers, lockfiles and seeds.
acceptanceCriteria: Runs on at least 3 open datasets via Nextflow (nf-core/rnaseq backbone); references pinned by release + checksum.
Prefers recount3/ARCHS4 reprocessed inputs where available; re-quantifies from open SRA/ENA only when license permits.
Reproducible: digest-pinned containers + lockfiles + seeds; documented one-command run.
Commit is DCO signed-off; no secrets in repo or logs.
output: A pull request adding the nf-core-based quantification pipeline running on ≥3 open datasets.
